title: Major Arcana Tarot Cards
description: A Deck of Powerful Cards at Your Disposal
body:
Power to the Player . . . 

  Adds 22 Major Arcana Cards That Can be Aquired With The Tarot Card Box.  Just right click *Most* cards to use and remove them [The Judgement Card Can Not be Right Clicked]. Small toolitps are for each card hinting towards their uses.


  **_Card Descriptions_**

  The Fool [_A Nice Start_]
  Sets Food and Health to Full
  Gives The Luck Effect for 3000t's

  The Magician [_Unlock Your Potential_]
  Gives Speed and Haste for 2400t's

  The High Priestes [_Back to The Origin_]
  Teleports the User Back to World Spawn

  The Empress [_A Nurturing Green Thumb_]
  Grows Plants in a 3x3x1 Box Around the User

  The Emperor [_The One in Charge_]
  Gives Strength and Resistance for 1200ts

  The Hierophant [_The Knowledgeable One_]
  Gives 1395 XP [30L] and 32 Lapis Lazuli

  The Lovers [Two of a Kind]
  Summons A Set of Random Breedable Mobs

  The Chariot [_Keep Moving Foreward_]
  Gives you Fire Resistance and Resistance for 1200t's

  The Strength [_Recover From the Fall_]
  Sets Health, Food, and Saturation to Full

  The Hermit [_Alone With Your Thoughts_]
  Teleports you 26 above Yourself on top of a wool block

  The Wheel [_A Chance Encounter_]
  Summons a Random Human-Like Mob

  The Justice [_A Fair Balance_]
  A 50/50 Shot of Getting a Balancing Pair of Potion Effects

  The Hanged Man [_A Swift Retreat_]
  Effects All Players with Speed and Weakness
  Effects All NON Players with Slowness and Weakness

  The Death [_A Sudden Depart_]
  Kills Everything That Is Not A Player

  The Temperence [_Avoid the Extreme_]
  Flings the User Into The Air

  The Devil [_Immense Power, But at What Cost_]
  Sets the Users Health to 1
  Gives A High Level of Strength

  The Tower [_Mass Destruction_]
  Summons Primed TNT Around the User

  The Star [_A Blessed Gift_]
  Give a Random Gold Item

  The Moon [_An Illusive Copy_]
  Summons a Stone Dummy in your stead
  Gives the User Speed and Invisibility

  The Sun [_Immense Vitality_]
  Gives the User Lv 6 Absorption for 1200t's

  The Judgement [_Resurrection_]
  Revives the User With Full Health

  The World [_A Triumphant Reward_]
  Gives a Random MiniBoss Item
